title: StyleRegistry
description: A registry of citation styles with alias resolution.

version.description: Version identifier for the registry format.

styles.description: List of style entries in the registry.

RegistryEntry.description: A single entry in a style registry.

id.description: Canonical style ID, must match the key used in `get_embedded_style`.

aliases.description: Short aliases that resolve to this entry (default empty).

builtin.description: Name of an embedded style (present for the default registry).

path.description: Relative path to a YAML file (used in local registries).

StyleKind.description: Tier classification for a style in the registry.

oneOf.description: Complete style that serves as an inheritance root.
Organizational adaptation of a base style (publisher, society, standards body).
Pure alias pointing to a profile or base style.
Standalone style with no aliases and no inheritance role.
